title: panelforge_figures provenance.json sidecar
description: Provenance chain sidecar emitted next to every rendered figure (PDF/PNG). See docs/spec_provenance_chain.md for full semantics. The sidecar content-addresses the figure back to (a) its source data files, (b) the recipe module that produced it, (c) the scorer state that selected it, and (d) the rendering environment.

schema_version.description: Semver of this sidecar's JSON-Schema; v2.0.0 ships '1.0.0'.

figure_path.description: Repo-relative path to the figure file (PDF or PNG). Absolute paths are discouraged for privacy (spec §10).

figure_sha256.description: SHA-256 hex digest of the figure file's bytes.

rendered_at.description: ISO-8601 UTC timestamp of when the figure was rendered. Set to '1970-01-01T00:00:00Z' under --committed for archival determinism.

recipe.description: Identifier and provenance of the recipe module that produced the figure.

module_sha.description: git blob sha of the recipe .py file (sha1 of git's blob format), or null if not in a git tree.

module_path.description: Path to the recipe .py file. Repo-relative when possible.

panelforge_git_commit.description: Full git HEAD sha, or 'uncommitted' for dirty trees, or 'unknown' if .git is unreachable.

data.description: Source data files referenced by the recipe and the column mapping the binding step produced.

sources.description: One entry per source data file consumed by the recipe.

path.description: Path to the source data file.

sha256.description: SHA-256 of the file's bytes; null if the file was missing at provenance-write time.

n_rows.description: Number of rows in the source file when loaded. Optional.

size_bytes.description: Optional byte size of the source file.

column_mapping.description: Verbatim binding from the intake step (contract field → column name).

scorer.description: Scorer state at the time of selection. Null when the recipe was rendered standalone (figures render <name>).

weights.description: Locked scoring weights at render time.

score.description: Final scorer score for this recipe.

tied_with.description: Recipes tied at the same score, broken by tie-breaker.

profile.description: Project profile fields used by the scorer (open-ended in v1.0; will tighten in v1.1 — spec §6.6).

audit.description: Statistical-contract audit findings. Null if no audit ran.

rules_passed.description: rule_ids of audit rules that passed.

rules_failed.description: rule_ids that refused; should be empty for any successfully-rendered figure.

rendering_environment.description: Snapshot of the rendering environment used to produce the figure.

panelforge_workspace.description: Path to the panelforge workspace at render time.

font_cache_sha256.description: Hash of matplotlib's fontlist cache for cross-machine determinism (spec §6).

rng_seed.description: Numpy RNG seed used by the recipe.

deterministic.description: True iff the recipe declares deterministic=True and a seed is fixed.
